use_cases: Loading indicator for async operations like data fetching or API calls
Placeholder spinner while content loads on pages
通用加载状态反馈组件
ai_summary: A visually distinctive loading spinner component featuring a central glowing amber node with animated weaving threads radiating outward. Built with pure CSS animations including keyframe effects for pulsing and weaving motion, 3D transforms for perspective, and gradient-based glow effects. Self-contained with no external dependencies or props, making it an ideal drop-in loading indicator for any React application.
